title: Review: daemon/cli/tui/bot round 20
notes:
Maintainer risk: HIGH — three P0 correctness bugs (message_set ghost-send, DELIVER/MLS identity confusion, Space/get inconsistent snapshot) are user-visible failure modes that will generate support reports once the daemon is used with multi-chat or MLS-active setups.
Confidence: 20% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) jmap.rs is 2300+ lines and the message_query and message_queryChanges handlers were not read in full; (2) cli/src/commands.rs was not read (287KB file exceeded read limit) — command handlers may have their own issues; (3) tui/src/event.rs was not read. Would raise confidence if: commands.rs and tui/event.rs were reviewed, and message_query pagination edge cases were tested.
